enhancedSubtitle: Agent-Based Federated Learning Platform with Live Ontology Integration
enhancedDescription: Real-time Agent Communication and Human-Readable Rule Processing
msgPatient: New case received: 45-year-old female, mammography study. Initiating diagnostic workflow...
msgImaging: Mammography analysis complete. Detected suspicious mass in upper left quadrant. Requesting radiomics analysis...
msgRadiomics: Texture analysis shows high heterogeneity (0.84). Shape irregularity detected (0.79). Triggering high-risk assessment protocol...
rule1Desc: If a patient has imaging studies where both texture analysis shows values above 0.8 AND shape irregularity exceeds 0.75, then automatically classify this case as HIGH RISK and trigger urgent review protocols.
rule2Desc: When a patient over 40 years old receives a HIGH RISK classification from imaging analysis, immediately flag their case for urgent medical review and notify the clinical team within 24 hours.
rule3Desc: Include patient data in federated learning only if: data quality score exceeds 90%, patient has provided explicit consent for research participation, and the imaging study meets technical quality standards.
update5: Ontology consistency verified: No conflicts detected
